title: urtica dioica var. carpatica
intro: Urtica dioica var. carpatica, commonly known as the Alpine Nettle or Mountain Nettle, is a subspecies of the stinging nettle plant native to mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Urtica dioica var. carpatica include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as improving symptoms of arthritis and other conditions. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or cream, and is often used topically to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
